title: 腾讯 Agent Mail 内测体验 + 优化版 Skill 分享
content: Tencent's QQ Mail team launched Agently Mail, an isolated email service for AI agents currently in beta. Users can apply via WeChat for two customizable email addresses. The service offers full mail operations, two-step sending confirmation, and prompt injection protection. The official Skill has issues with HTML email rendering due to shell parsing problems across platforms. An optimized version bypasses shell layers using Node.js spawnSync for consistent cross-platform HTML email support, including tables, images, and inline CSS.

title: K8s 发布失败后，大家第一眼先看哪？
content: The author observes that Kubernetes deployment failures prompt different first responses: checking CI pipelines for image build issues, verifying Helm/Argo CD resource delivery, inspecting pod events and status with kubectl, or examining application logs directly. They seek consensus on whether to first confirm deployment execution success or investigate why pods failed to start, and whether teams follow fixed diagnostic sequences or ad-hoc troubleshooting based on error symptoms.

title: Marc Andreessen on AI, Technology, and the Future of Humanity
content: Marc Andreessen discusses AI, technology, and human progress with Michael Malice. Drawing on decades of tech experience, he argues that common fears about technology stem from misunderstanding innovation. Andreessen explains how large language models differ from earlier AI visions, and why he believes AI will expand rather than replace human capability. The conversation covers automation, productivity, cybersecurity, economic growth, creativity, and historical patterns of technological disruption.

title: 使用 kkRepo 搭建 Maven 私服
content: kkRepo is an open-source, self-hosted artifact repository supporting Maven, npm, PyPI, Go, Helm, and Docker/OCI formats. To set up a Maven private server, run the quickstart script to launch kkRepo with MySQL. Create three repository types: hosted repositories for releases and snapshots, a proxy for Maven Central, and a group combining all three. Clients pull dependencies through the single group URL, while publishes go to the appropriate hosted repository.

title: Google 修改用户名之后，原来的邮箱还能收件吗？什么规则啊
content: Changing a Google username typically affects the email address format, but Google usually allows receiving mail at the old address for a transition period. The exact rules depend on whether it's a Gmail change, Google Workspace account, or other scenario. Google generally forwards emails from the old address to the new one temporarily, though permanent retention isn't guaranteed. Users should check Google's official account policies for specific timeframe details and set up forwarding manually if needed for continuity.

title: 突发奇想，快速写了一个 a2a 的实际使用例子
content: A developer created an A2A protocol demo after a colleague asked about enabling communication between Cursor IDE agents. The solution uses a hub server for message collection and forwarding, allowing multiple clients to send messages, create tasks, and check pending tasks. Unlike Claude Code Teams, it works across devices and supports any client. The initial version was built quickly with Claude Code and is available on GitHub, with further improvements planned.

title: 安卓原生 AI 编程(Termux)
content: Termux provides a Linux environment on Android without requiring root, using Bionic libc instead of glibc. It supports native AI coding tools like OpenCode and MiMo Code, which offer web interfaces for easier browser-based operation. Installation involves downloading Termux, then adding glibc, Python, Node.js, and other development languages via package managers. Additional tools include Codex, Claude Code, and Bun. Remote SSH access is enabled through OpenSSH on port 8022. Android 12+ users should unlock the 32-thread app limit in developer options.

title: 央视曝高报机构乱象，高价倒卖AI免费服务，如何看待这一现象？
content: CCTV exposed chaos in college application consulting agencies. Many so-called "experts" are actually sales staff with minimal training who fabricate credentials. Agencies use livestreams to attract clients, then direct them to WeChat groups where paid shills create false impressions of active consultation. Some consultants use AI tools like Qianwen to search answers during sessions but mishandle them. Fees range from hundreds to tens of thousands of yuan, raising questions whether such paid services are genuine necessity or exploitative profit-seeking.

The third affair partner was identified as a Harvard medical doctor and healthcare entrepreneur previously named a notable woman to watch.

title: Zombie unicorns are haunting Silicon Valley
content: Zombie unicorns—once-vaunted tech startups valued at $1 billion that have since declined—are now prevalent in Silicon Valley. These companies, marked by failed IPOs, mass layoffs, and plunging valuations, represent a significant shift in the venture capital landscape. The phenomenon reflects broader economic pressures, including higher interest rates and reduced investor appetite for high-risk growth companies, forcing a reckoning in how startups are funded and valued.

title: 大家都是怎么深度使用 Codex 的？我现在让它自己沉淀项目经验，但感觉还不够体系化
content: A developer seeks to deepen Codex usage beyond basic coding tasks by systematically accumulating project context—architecture, conventions, business logic—to reduce repetitive explanations. Current attempts include letting Codex generate and maintain project documentation. Key uncertainties: optimal storage location (README, AGENTS.md, docs, rules, or dedicated AI knowledge base), balance between auto-generated and human-curated content, effective skill types (code review, SQL checking, test generation), practical MCP integrations for backend projects, verification mechanisms to prevent stale or incorrect accumulated knowledge, and stable workflows for Java/Spring Boot. Goal: a project-familiar assistant, not full automation.

Coal's defining feature is its extremely low value-to-weight ratio, making transport costs 4.4× higher than oil and 125× higher than copper as a share of commodity price. This creates regional pricing disparities and shapes all coal research.

China's coal demand faces triple mismatches in electricity: daily (solar noon peak vs. evening demand surge), seasonal (summer peak vs. wind/solar patterns), and regional. By 2030, coal's share of primary energy may fall to 45-48%, but absolute consumption likely grows slightly (29-36 billion tons standard coal) due to rising total energy demand.

title: 十年没正经写代码后，我靠 AI 把公司工作流重新搭了一遍
content: A former frontend developer turned product manager rebuilt his cross-border import company's internal workflow using AI after a decade away from coding. He tested multiple AI models: OpenClaw and Hermes for multi-agent coordination, DeepSeek and Qwen-Plus (prone to memory confusion), GLM (unexpected costs from uncontrolled context), Kimi (better long-context handling), and finally Claude/Codex (most reliable for complex multi-agent collaboration). He now uses cheap models for narrow, rule-based tasks and premium models for complex cross-departmental workflows, prioritizing stability and time savings over token costs.

title: 背刺老用户，MiniMax吞下苦果
content: MiniMax's stock has fluctuated sharply ahead of its first post-IPO lock-up expiry in July, when 63% of shares will become tradable. The volatility was triggered by an unannounced June price hike for its M3 model API that angered developers and caused a 15.7% single-day drop. Despite revenue growing 159% to $79 million in 2025, MiniMax posted a $2.5 billion adjusted net loss. Its C端 products generate 67% of revenue but just 4.7% gross margin, while higher-margin B端 API services remain underdeveloped. The company is now betting on AI Coding capabilities to compete with rivals like Zhipu, whose market cap is six times larger, and pursuing a secondary A-share listing to raise funds.

title: 互联网商业模式之死
content: The dominance of light-asset business models—exemplified by tech platforms and SaaS firms like Intuit that minimized physical infrastructure—is ending as AI disrupts traditional advantages. AI converts software and internet services into commoditized "pipes," threatening margins and valuations. Consequently, a new era favors heavy assets: tech giants including Google, Meta, and Alibaba are massively increasing capital expenditures on AI infrastructure and data centers, while investors embrace the "HALO" strategy (Heavy Assets, Low Obsolescence). Successful firms now pursue vertical integration, building "on-balance-sheet" infrastructure or embedding into supply chains to create defensible, AI-resistant capabilities through physical and systemic control.

title: OpenAI 发布首款芯片，只花了九个月
content: OpenAI has developed its first custom AI inference chip, named Jalapeño, in partnership with Broadcom and Celestica. The chip was designed from scratch for large language model inference in just nine months—a record timeline for advanced semiconductor development. OpenAI contributed the architecture design based on its deep understanding of AI workloads, while Broadcom handled chip implementation and networking, and Celestica managed system assembly. OpenAI also used its own AI models to accelerate parts of the chip design process. Early tests indicate significantly better performance-per-watt than current industry leaders. The chip is planned for deployment by late 2026 as the first step in a multi-generation computing platform, with the partners aiming for gigawatt-scale data centers.

title: 玻璃基板突然加速
content: Glass substrate technology for chip packaging is accelerating rapidly, driven by AI chip demand. BOE's May partnership with Corning triggered a stock surge across the supply chain. Intel and TSMC are pursuing glass substrates to replace different levels of chip carriers—Intel targets IC substrates to solve thermal warping in large AI chips, while TSMC aims to replace costly silicon interposers. Nvidia's Rubin GPU will adopt glass substrates by year-end. Panel manufacturers like Innolux and BOE are leveraging display expertise for chip packaging, with mass production expected around 2027.

content: The article analyzes Wang Furen's slap of her maid Jinchuan'er in *Dream of the Red Chamber*. The physical violence itself was unremarkable in the hierarchical society. What truly devastated Jinchuan'er was Wang's accompanying words: "You low whore, you've corrupted a fine young master." The insult's severity—branding her a seductress who corrupted Baoyu—doomed Jinchuan'er to social ruin, driving her to suicide.

content: Alibaba sued the U.S. Department of Defense in California to be removed from the "Chinese Military Companies" list, arguing the designation was arbitrary, lacked evidence, violated due process, and harmed its reputation. Alibaba stated it had communicated with the DoD for months and submitted detailed evidence refuting military ties without receiving a response.

title: 俞浩：追觅核心管理团队非常稳定，希望把员工都培养成乔布斯
content: Dreame founder Yu Hao stated at the 2026 Dalain Summer Davos Forum that the company's core management team of over 200 people remains highly stable, with fewer than five departures annually. He aims to cultivate engineers into innovators like Steve Jobs using established methodologies, with long-term goals of developing talent comparable to Elon Musk. The company rarely hires external executives, preferring internal growth through systematic models. Yu addressed recent media reports about departures, emphasizing that the actual turnover rate is very low despite concentrated coverage.

title: 武汉原反渎局长之子跨境洗钱案：6400万港元赃款成立5项犯罪 | 原文
content: Hong Kong's District Court convicted Xiao Rui, son of former Wuhan anti-corruption official Xiao Jun, of four money laundering charges and one count of using a false instrument copy on June 23, 2026. The decade-long cross-border corruption case involved 64 million HKD in illicit funds processed through Hong Kong after Xiao Rui obtained residency there in 2013 following his Australian studies. Sentencing was scheduled for July 23, 2026. The case exposed a complete corruption chain of official power abuse and family-based cross-border money laundering.
